recommendations.title: Standing Tall
recommendations.overview: The film tells the story of Malony and his education as he grows from a six-year-old into an 18-year-old. A minors’ judge and a caseworker work tirelessly to try to save the young offender.

recommendations.title: Peaceful
recommendations.overview: A son in denial of a serious illness. A mother facing the unbearable. And between them a doctor fighting to do his job and bring them to acceptance. The three of them have one year and four seasons to come together and understand what it means to die

recommendations.title: 150 Milligrams
recommendations.overview: In the hospital where she works in Brest, France, a lung specialist discovers a direct link between suspicious deaths and state-approved medicine. She fights single-handedly for the truth to come out.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Love, Simon
recommendations.overview: Everyone deserves a great love story, but for 17-year-old Simon Spier, it's a little more complicated. He hasn't told his family or friends that he's gay, and he doesn't know the identity of the anonymous classmate that he's fallen for online.

recommendations.title: The Boy
recommendations.overview: An intimate portrait of a 9 year old sociopath as he discovers his taste for killing.

recommendations.title: The Players
recommendations.overview: Eight short films explore the subject of male infidelity. Serial cheaters, Fred and Greg, spend a night on the town doing what they do best, and with absolutely no regrets. The duo play various characters in assorted extracurricular situations, rangi
recommendations.director: Michel Hazanavicius, Emmanuelle Bercot, Gilles Lellouche, Jean Dujardin, Fred Cavayé, Alexandre Courtes, Eric Lartigau

recommendations.title: Goat
recommendations.overview: Reeling from a terrifying assault, a nineteen year old enrolls into college with his brother and pledges the same fraternity. What happens there, in the name of 'brotherhood,' tests him and his loyalty in brutal ways.

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: Youtopia
recommendations.overview: Eighteen-year-old Matilde lives with her grandmother and her mother Laura, a woman struggling with debt and failures. Completely disconnected from reality and attached to her online avatar, Matilde has found her own way to make money: stripping on we
